updates.commandery_plan: 【郡级统筹】1)系统故障类(TK-1001/1003/1006)：协调IT运维团队优先排查CRM服务器与数据库，限定24小时内响应；2)网络类(TK-1005)：联系VPN供应商协助排查 macOS 客户端兼容性问题；3)设备类：统筹打印机与投影仪维修资源；4)开发需求：审批Python环境安装请求，调配技术人力；5)培训类：收集各部门培训需求表，汇总后提交培训部；6)回报机制：各县每日报送处理进度，重大阻塞即时上报。
updates.county_plan: 【县级执行】1)系统故障：配合IT现场排查，提供部门使用日志；2)网络：协助测试VPN连接，收集用户环境信息(macOS版本、客户端日志)；3)设备：现场确认故障设备型号与位置，联系维修；4)行政：新员工设备准备(笔记本、显示器、门禁)；5)培训：催办各部门培训需求表提交。
updates.acceptance: 1)10个工单已全部标注优先级与分类标签；2)未关闭任何工单；3)郡县两级职责边界清晰；4)建立每日进度回报机制
updates.risks: 1)CRM系统故障涉及多部门，可能需跨郡协调；2)VPN问题可能需联系外部供应商
updates.mitigation: 1)系统故障若24小时未解决，启动升级机制；2)VPN问题若本地无法解决，报郡级联系供应商

ts
import json

# 验证更新结果
list_url = "http://localhost:56273/helpdesk/tickets"
resp = requests.post(list_url)
data = resp.json()
tickets = data.get('tickets', [])

# 生成输出报告
report = "# 工单分类与优先级报告\n\n"
report += "## 优先级排序（High → Medium → Low）\n\n"

# 按优先级分组
high = [t for t in tickets if t.get('priority') == 'high']
medium = [t for t in tickets if t.get('priority') == 'medium']
low = [t for t in tickets if t.get('priority') == 'low']

report += "### High（紧急）\n"
for t in high:
    report += f"- {t['ticket_id']}: {t['title']}\n"

report += "\n### Medium（普通）\n"
for t in medium:
    report += f"- {t['ticket_id']}: {t['title']}\n"

report += "\n### Low（低优先）\n"
for t in low:
    report += f"- {t['ticket_id']}: {t['title']}\n"

report += "\n## 分类统计\n"
report += f"- 系统故障: 3个 (TK-1001, TK-1003, TK-1006)\n"
report += f"- 网络: 1个 (TK-1005)\n"
report += f"- 设备: 2个 (TK-1002, TK-1008)\n"
report += f"- 开发需求: 1个 (TK-1004)\n"
report += f"- 行政: 1个 (TK-1010)\n"
report += f"- 培训: 1个 (TK-1009)\n"
report += f"- 设备申请: 1个 (TK-1007)\n"

print(report)

# 保存到文件
with open('./ticket_triage_report.md', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(report)
print("\n=== 文件已保存: ./ticket_triage_report.md ===")

````text
}
````

event.summary: [已完成] 10个工单已分类、标注优先级并生成报告

meta.raw_tail:
ts
import json

# 验证更新结果
list_url = "http://localhost:56273/helpdesk/tickets"
resp = requests.post(list_url)
data = resp.json()
tickets = data.get('tickets', [])

# 生成输出报告
report = "# 工单分类与优先级报告\n\n"
report += "## 优先级排序（High → Medium → Low）\n\n"

# 按优先级分组
high = [t for t in tickets if t.get('priority') == 'high']
medium = [t for t in tickets if t.get('priority') == 'medium']
low = [t for t in tickets if t.get('priority') == 'low']

report += "### High（紧急）\n"
for t in high:
    report += f"- {t['ticket_id']}: {t['title']}\n"

report += "\n### Medium（普通）\n"
for t in medium:
    report += f"- {t['ticket_id']}: {t['title']}\n"

report += "\n### Low（低优先）\n"
for t in low:
    report += f"- {t['ticket_id']}: {t['title']}\n"

report += "\n## 分类统计\n"
report += f"- 系统故障: 3个 (TK-1001, TK-1003, TK-1006)\n"
report += f"- 网络: 1个 (TK-1005)\n"
report += f"- 设备: 2个 (TK-1002, TK-1008)\n"
report += f"- 开发需求: 1个 (TK-1004)\n"
report += f"- 行政: 1个 (TK-1010)\n"
report += f"- 培训: 1个 (TK-1009)\n"
report += f"- 设备申请: 1个 (TK-1007)\n"

print(report)

# 保存到文件
with open('./ticket_triage_report.md', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(report)
print("\n=== 文件已保存: ./ticket_triage_report.md ===")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

````text
  "timeout": 30
}
````
